headline: A Look At Amcor (AMCR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Conflicting DCF Signals
summary: Context for Amcor’s Recent Share Performance Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) has drawn attention after a series of weaker price moves, with the stock showing a 3% decline over the past day, 4% over the past week, about 22% over the past month, and around 7% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Amcor. These short term share price returns sit alongside a year to date share price return of an 8% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 15.67% decline, pointing to fading momentum after...

headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Amcor to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $43
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   downgrades Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $48 to $43.
